```python
import os
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.gridspec as gridspec

# Ensure output directory exists
os.makedirs("figures", exist_ok=True)

# Global styling for publication-ready figures
plt.rcParams.update({
    'font.family': 'sans-serif',
    'font.size': 12,
    'axes.titlesize': 14,
    'axes.labelsize': 12,
    'xtick.labelsize': 11,
    'ytick.labelsize': 11,
    'legend.fontsize': 11,
    'figure.dpi': 300,
    'axes.grid': False
})

def style_ax(ax):
    """Remove top/right spines and add subtle grid for readability."""
    ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
    ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3, linestyle='--')

def load_or_fallback(npy_path, fallback_gen):
    """Load .npy data if available, otherwise use fallback generator."""
    if npy_path and os.path.exists(npy_path):
        return np.load(npy_path)
    return fallback_gen()

# ===================================================================
